# Curator Receipt

## Decision

The source is kept because it is a research preprint with clear empirical evaluation and measured results.

## Why

The excerpt describes a formal preprint analyzing five popular multi-agent systems across more than 150 tasks and traces, with six expert annotators, reported inter-annotator agreement, an explicit failure taxonomy, and validation of an automated judge pipeline. That is real experimental substance, not commentary or theorycraft.

## Limits
